overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting students in wizard robes gathered in a covered timber-framed courtyard pavilion. The setting features heavy wooden beams, stone flooring, and views of green lawns outside, rendered in high-quality Unreal Engine style lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered timber courtyard pavilion with study tables

agents.ego_description: standing still in the pavilion observing the students and surroundings

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing at the central table, occasionally shifting position
student in dark robes with red scarf standing near the left table

entered.detail: heavy wooden beam ceiling structure with triangular trusses
thick timber columns supporting the roof structure
light-colored stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
rustic wooden study tables with benches arranged in the pavilion
sunlit grassy area visible through the open pavilion entrance
dark wooden double doors with metal hardware set in stone wall
green plants in terracotta pots along the left wall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a covered timber-framed courtyard pavilion in a wizarding school setting. Students in dark robes stand scattered around wooden study tables on stone flooring, while bright sunlight illuminates the green lawn visible through the open archway. The heavy wooden architecture creates a warm, sheltered atmosphere with natural light filtering through.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, immersive view of a sheltered wizarding school pavilion that emphasizes the contrast between a cozy interior and a bright exterior. It begins within the warm, shaded atmosphere of the timber-framed courtyard, where students in dark robes are gathered around wooden study tables. The camera lingers on the heavy wooden architecture and stone flooring, capturing the natural light filtering through the structure. The scene then draws the eye toward the open archway, where the sheltered interior gives way to the vivid brilliance of a sunlit green lawn.
